summary: Iteration 10: Complete testing of PDF Import (e-Factura format), Post-NIR Barcode Dialog, and CSV Import features. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. PDF parser correctly extracts 4 products from Romanian invoice with correct quantities and prices. Barcode dialog appears after both manual NIR and PDF NIR saves. CSV import shows preview with Nou/Actualizare badges. Admin-only buttons correctly hidden for casier role.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (minor)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 PDF Import, Post-NIR Barcode Dialog, and CSV Import features fully tested. Key points: (1) POST /api/nir/parse-pdf uses PyMuPDF blocks to extract products from Romanian e-Factura PDFs - extracts invoice_number, supplier_name, and items with denumire_pdf, cantitate, pret_unitar, um. (2) POST /api/products/bulk-barcode updates barcodes for multiple products at once. (3) After NIR save (manual or PDF), barcode dialog opens with all NIR products listed for barcode scanning. (4) CSV import supports comma and semicolon delimiters, multiple encodings. (5) All import/NIR buttons are admin-only. Test PDF available at /tmp/test_factura.pdf.

features: Parses Romanian e-Factura PDFs using PyMuPDF blocks
Extracts supplier name (TOP MASTER L.T.D. SRL)
Extracts 4 products with correct names, quantities, and prices
Matches extracted items with existing products in database
Updates barcodes for multiple products at once
Used after NIR save for barcode scanning
Barcode input field for each product
Enter key moves to next input
Skip button to close without saving
